basic_details.job_title: TIFR Project Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) has released the official Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 03 vacancies have been announced under the TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Full Time Diploma in Civil Engineering (from a recognized University/Institute with aggregate of 60% marks), Knowledge of use of personal computers and its applications, 2 years' experience in supervision of civil & public health activities during construction works in a reputed organization
qualification.details: Full Time Diploma in Civil Engineering (from a recognized University/Institute with aggregate of 60% marks). Knowledge of use of personal computers and its applications. 2 years' experience in supervision of civil & public health activities during construction works in a reputed organization.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TIFR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] Job 2026 Notification PDF

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Full Time Diploma in Civil Engineering (from a recognized University/Institute with aggregate of 60% marks). TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TIFR to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] posts is 18th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] position in this recruitment drive by TIFR.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Full Time Diploma in Civil Engineering with at least 60% marks from a recognized institution, along with computer knowledge and 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] post is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 63,900 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TIFR Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] post will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply for this recruitment through the online mode only, via the official website of TIFR.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Junior Engineer (B) [Civil] is a contractual job offered by the Tata Institute of Fundamental Research.
